Items.Title: Croatia earn narrow win to knock out Panama
Items.Description: Croatia remain in contention for a last-32 spot at the World Cup after earning their first points in Group L with a win over Panama, who are knocked out of the World Cup following the loss.

Items.Title: Croatia bounce back as Budimir strike eliminates Panama
Items.Description: Ante Budimir came off the bench to ignite Croatia's World Cup and eliminate Panama as the 2018 finalists won 1-0 in Toronto.

Items.Title: Who is the referee for Croatia vs Panama?
